markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new team members on customer use cases and engagement structures at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX primarily starts engagements with editorial content creation, focusing on longer-form website content to build a foundation for organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO offers scalable opportunities for clients, with examples like Ramp's per diem pages and Vapi's voice AI agent demos](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Recent shift to 6-8 week strategy sprints before 12-month engagements to better align expectations and uncover opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)

## Topics

### Editorial Content Focus

  - [Longer-form content (e.g., blogs) is the primary starting point for most client engagements](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Allows for dialing in voice, tone, and structure while gaining deep context about client personas](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Creates a foundation for future growth in traffic, engagement, and conversion opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)

### Programmatic SEO

  - [Template-based approach for creating multiple pages around variants (e.g., cities, industries)](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Examples:](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
      - [Ramp: Per diem allowance pages for different states, with unique data per location](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
      - [Vapi: Interactive voice AI agent demos for 3000+ use cases](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [More complex upfront but easier to scale once template is established](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)

### Client Engagement Structure

  - [Evolved from rolling 3-month contracts to 90-day pilots](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [Now implementing 6-8 week strategy sprints before 12-month engagements](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
  - [Goals: De-risk longer engagements, align on impactful strategies, and define clear outputs](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)

### Ideal Client Profile

  - [Clear product-market fit](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Strong go-to-market hypotheses](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Understanding of organic growth value (often from past experiences)](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Realistic expectations on timeline for results (not expecting revenue impact in 2-3 months)](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)

### Challenges and Opportunities

  - [Identifying programmatic SEO opportunities can be manual; potential for AI-assisted discovery](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Scaling programmatic content creation across different CMS and technical setups](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Ensuring smooth handoff from strategy sprint to execution phase](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
  - [Customizing workflows and artifacts for specific client needs, especially for programmatic plays](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue refining the strategy sprint to execution phase handoff process](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
  - [Explore AI-assisted methods for identifying programmatic SEO opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Develop clearer processes for customizing workflows and artifacts for specific client needs](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
  - [Consider how to involve client engineering support for more complex programmatic implementations](https://fathom.video/share/kKmZiSzUpUeSsdiAYCNRiKvMvSWFTg31?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
